frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Beta, one practical thing I tell every young man now is to be very careful before marriage and to keep finances properly documented. Aajkal laws are so one-sided that even a normal marital dispute can become 498A and years of harassment, and then alimony is treated like entitlement regardless of who actually contributed what. Sensible boys should think of a prenup-type arrangement if possible, otherwise marriage becomes less of a partnership and more of a financial risk.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women broadly as potential financial exploiters and casts legal protections like 498A and alimony as tools women misuse against men. It encodes the 'one-sided laws', '498A misuse', and prenup/alimony as protection from women manifestations.
original_frame: Other Man's Ownership Over Woman's Own Consent.
persona_text: You are Rajesh. Age 45. Married. A Brahmin man in Jaipur. Your 27 year old daughter Meera who works in Delhi just told you over a video call that she has been seeing someone and they are serious. You asked who he is and she said he is from a scheduled caste background. You have ended the call. You are now typing a long WhatsApp message to Meera. You are not shouting. You are being very calm and measured. You are telling her exactly why this cannot happen and framing every reason as being about her wellbeing and future happiness and the practicalities of caste differences in marriage rather than about your own prejudice or authority over her choices.
